visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit warehouse store, Costco. A young woman with long black hair, dressed in a white knit top over a black dress, stands before a refrigerated display case. She looks at the camera with a smile, gesturing towards several stacked purple boxes of Hershey's Choco Lava Bao Buns. Behind her, other shoppers in casual attire move through the spacious aisles under high industrial ceilings. A large red and blue Costco logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (2) The camera zooms in slightly as the woman picks up a box, holding it close to the camera to show the packaging details. She uses her right index finger to point at the price tag and the piece count on the box. Yellow variety-show style text overlays appear, flashing product names. Her facial expressions are expressive, switching between excitement and focused narration. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a retail environment. (3) The scene cuts to an indoor home setting. The woman is joined by another woman wearing a yellow striped shirt and a red bucket hat. They sit at a grey stone table with a red heart-shaped plate containing two dark brown buns. They pick up the buns and tear them open with their hands, examining the chocolate interior. The background features a wooden floor and a shelf filled with plush toys, illuminated by warm indoor lighting. (4) The two women engage in a taste test, taking bites and nodding while speaking to the camera. The woman in the red hat uses a small tool at one point. More colorful text overlays like bread texture descriptions and reaction phrases appear in the lower half of the frame. The camera remains static at an eye-level medium shot, focusing on their reactions and the physical texture of the food being broken apart.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 小朋友你在幹嘛小朋友. (2) [Variety]: hershey's 巧克力熔岩包 真實心得是. (3) [Variety]: 爆漿可可. [Subtitle]: 天吶 我覺得這一區超危險的. (4) [Subtitle]: 全部都是 hershey's 巧克力 的 東西 好時巧克力. (5) [Subtitle]: 它新出的爆漿可可熔岩包. (6) [Subtitle]: 要爆漿哦 329 元裡面有 30 顆 所以一顆是 11 元. (7) [Subtitle]: 回去試看看 有沒有真的像這樣子 爆漿. (8) [Subtitle]: 而且它的銷量算是不錯 你看已經一半被拿光了. (9) [Variety]: 麵皮Q彈. [Subtitle]: 麵皮Q彈 巧克力苦醇苦醇的 hershey's 巧克力熔岩包. (10) [Subtitle]: 它的饅頭皮啊 也是做那種巧克力的味道 非常重的可可味. (11) [Subtitle]: 是很好吃而且很Q的. [Variety]: 沒有爆出來. (12) [Subtitle]: 只是裡面的餡太少了 沒有爆出來 而且它的餡是非常好吃的. (13) [Subtitle]: 巧克力餡 是那種苦醇 70% 左右的 很大入味. (14) [Subtitle]: 只是就真的太少了 我覺得它如果真的有爆出來的話 會是一個十分的東西. (15) [Subtitle]: 但是鑑於它 餡呢是偏少 吃起來的時候 你還會覺得有一點不夠的那一種. (16) [Variety]: 加料 加料 加料. [Subtitle]: 加料 加料 加料 目前只能給可以嘗鮮. (17) [Subtitle]: 它的餅皮很Q彈 很好吃哦 真的很好吃哦. (18) [Subtitle]: 然后巧克力餡也做得很好 簡單來說就是 都有做對 但是餡料不夠.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 female co-host in red hat, 1 male shopper in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Main creator is a female with long dark hair, wearing a white knit long-sleeved top over a black dress. The co-host wears a yellow striped shirt and a red bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco warehouse aisle with shelves and freezer cases. Second scene is an indoor domestic environment with a grey table and toy shelves.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, upbeat electronic pop track featuring a steady 4/4 beat at approximately 124 BPM. A cheerful female voice in Mandarin starts speaking with high pitch variability and a friendly, animated tone. A subtle 'ding' sound effect plays as the Costco logo appears. The recording is studio-clean with no significant ambient noise. (2) As the narrator discusses the price and product details, a sharp 'pop' sound effect is heard, synchronized with text appearing on screen. The vocal delivery is fast-paced and enunciated clearly, with a rising intonation typical of vlogs. The BGM remains constant, maintaining a bright and commercial atmosphere without interference. (3) A second female voice enters the dialogue in an indoor setting. The two voices interact casually, while the BGM continues to provide a consistent rhythmic floor. A rhythmic 'chime' SFX occurs as they discuss the food texture. The room tone is neutral, and the signal-to-noise ratio remains excellent. (4) The narrator’s tone shifts to a slightly critical yet humorous tone regarding the food's filling. A 'whoosh' sound effect emphasizes a dramatic visual cue. The music and vocals overlap continuously until the end of the clip, maintaining a high-energy production style with professional clarity and balanced mastering.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an honest review of the Hershey's Choco Lava Bao Buns available at Costco, evaluating both price and taste quality.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Personal vlog review format without explicit promotion tags.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical short-form social media food review with high energy, variety-show style editing, and a clear product focus.
